pain_points: Clinicians spend 2-3 hours per day on documentation that should take 30 minutes
Prior auth denials are not tracked — the team re-submits the same denials repeatedly
context: Met with CTO and VP of Product. They are evaluating ambient AI documentation tools but have no ML team internally. Budget for a POC is available in Q3. The prior auth problem is their biggest clinical complaint — they lose 15% of submissions to avoidable denials. They have 3 years of encounter data in PostgreSQL but have never done any analytics beyond basic reporting.
